cases.title: Checkout completed event awards purchased credits
cases.expected: Purchased credits are awarded once with a purchase_stripe ledger reason/ref.

cases.title: Duplicate Stripe event does not double-award credits
cases.expected: Duplicate event is ignored/idempotent and credits are not double-awarded.

cases.title: Invalid signature is rejected
cases.expected: Webhook is rejected and no credits are awarded.

cases.title: Unknown event type is handled safely
cases.expected: Event is safely ignored or acknowledged without creating credits.

cases.title: Database failure does not mark credit award successful
cases.expected: Failure does not create false success state and can be retried safely.
